proposed_next_lift_attempt.binding_strategy: Try to bind all 18 WXYZTI role rows through shared edge, column, phase, component, sector, or vertex fields exposed by the inspected schemas.
proposed_next_lift_attempt.anti_overfit_rule: Do not target residual cycle-role rows. Apply candidate lift functions uniformly to all 18 role rows.

interpretation.main_result: The P900 phase-30 combined graph export is the primary lift source because it exposes 900- and 3600-sized graph layers.
interpretation.what_this_gives: A row-to-G900 lift attempt can now target concrete schema paths rather than free-form assumptions.
interpretation.what_remains_open: No actual WXYZTI row has been lifted yet.
interpretation.next_question: Can a uniform lift function attach G900/P900 vertex, edge, phase, component, or sheet signatures to all 18 role rows?
